title: Window function 'lag' BAD_ARGUMENTS on remote node
description:
### Describe what's wrong
```
DB::Exception: Window function 'lag' does not expect window frame to be explicitly specified.
```
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```sql
CREATE TABLE position_evaluation
(
`symbol` String,
`evaluated_at` DateTime64(3),
`mark_price` Decimal(18, 8),
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY (symbol, evaluated_at);
insert into position_evaluation select * from generateRandom('symbol String, evaluated_at DateTime64(3), mark_price Decimal(18, 8)', 1) LIMIT 100;
SELECT lag(mark_price) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY evaluated_at ASC) AS last_mark_price
FROM remote('127.0.0.1', currentDatabase(), position_evaluation);
```
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/c6d79f85-b979-4ac1-a4b0-7c2f2221cf08
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE position_evaluation_v2 (symbol VARCHAR(255), evaluated_at TIMESTAMP, mark_price DECIMAL(18, 8), volume INTEGER);
INSERT INTO position_evaluation_v2 (symbol, evaluated_at, mark_price, volume) SELECT 'AAPL', NOW(), 150.00, 100;

SELECT symbol, evaluated_at, mark_price, (SELECT MAX(mark_price) FROM position_evaluation_v2 AS sub WHERE sub.symbol = position_evaluation_v2.symbol AND sub.evaluated_at < position_evaluation_v2.evaluated_at) AS last_mark_price FROM position_evaluation_v2;

SELECT symbol, evaluated_at, mark_price, (SELECT MAX(mark_price) FROM position_evaluation_v2 AS sub WHERE sub.symbol = position_evaluation_v2.symbol AND sub.evaluated_at < position_evaluation_v2.evaluated_at) AS last_mark_price_with_default FROM position_evaluation_v2;

SELECT symbol, evaluated_at, mark_price, (SELECT MAX(mark_price) FROM position_evaluation_v2 AS sub WHERE sub.symbol = position_evaluation_v2.symbol AND sub.evaluated_at < position_evaluation_v2.evaluated_at) AS last_mark_price_invalid FROM position_evaluation_v2;
key_bug_features: Window function 'lag' with explicit window frame
